falsification_conditions.condition: Price increases by 10% or more from current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A decisive upward move would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by confirming a bullish trend contrary to the pattern's implied consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score rises above 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Exceeding this threshold would indicate a confirmed blowoff top, directly contradicting the pattern's similarity to a bottom formation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume spikes to 200% or more above 14-day average on a single day
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge would signal extreme market participation, invalidating the 'HOLD' by proving a breakout in either direction.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
